rules.rule_text:
rule malware_Nanocore_strings
{
	meta:
		description = "detect Nanocore in memory"
		author = "JPCERT/CC Incident Response Group"
		rule_usage = "memory scan"
		reference = "internal research"

	strings:
		$v1 = "NanoCore Client"
		$v2 = "PluginCommand"
		$v3 = "CommandType"

	condition:
		all of them
}
